title: Cloud running
review_text: Switched from AeroFlex Runner 2 for my long runs. The cushioning is on another level. My knees feel so much better after 10+ mile runs.

title: Great but heavy
review_text: Love the soft ride but these are noticeably heavier than my old shoes. Perfect for recovery days, not for speed work.

title: Rocker takes getting used to
review_text: The rocker shape felt weird for the first few runs. Almost returned them. By run 4 it clicked and now I love them. Stick with it.
